description: Words of F.D.R. spoken by Charlton Heston ; narrator, Arthur Kennedy ; consultant, Mrs. Franklin D. Roosevelt
An episode in the ABC-TV series F.D.R

Discusses the struggle of labor for recognition under the New Deal. Describes the strife between labor and management, with Roosevelt supporting the rights of the workers, and the resulting protective legislation
